constraints: Keep responses concise: around 300 words or fewer to fit on one screen.
Use concise, structured answers; pause with a count to two before responding.
Limit to 2-3 bullets or STAR points when answering.
References: prepare 2–3 professional references with contact details; keep a ready-to-share references list and PDFs of any letters; bring a printed copy only if requested.
decisions: In-the-moment interview approach: Pause, state the goal in one sentence; pick one primary metric; call out 1-2 secondary metrics; add one guardrail metric; state a simple success criterion and timeframe.
open: Backup navigation plan for interview: offline maps, printed directions, charger/backups
On-site exercise type hinted by recruiter: case or roleplay not specified
